rcomplex 0.1.0
  • Reference

Reduce orthogroups by merging correlated paralogs

Source: R/RcppExports.R
reduce_orthogroups_cpp.Rd

For each HOG with multiple paralogs, computes pairwise Pearson correlation on the expression matrix, clusters with Ward.D2, and merges paralogs whose correlation exceeds cor_threshold into a single averaged representative.

reduce_orthogroups_cpp(expr, hog_members, non_hog_idx, cor_threshold)

Arguments

expr

Numeric matrix (genes x samples). Row order matches gene_ids.

hog_members

List of integer vectors. Each element contains 1-indexed row positions in expr for genes belonging to one HOG.

non_hog_idx

Integer vector of 1-indexed row positions for genes not assigned to any HOG (kept as-is).

cor_threshold

Pearson correlation threshold for merging (default 0.7).

Value

List with: expr_matrix (reduced matrix), out_row_source (1-indexed original row for each output row), map_from / map_to (1-indexed gene mapping), n_original, n_reduced, n_merged.

Contents
